name: clamav-base
title: clamav-base
summary: anti-virus utility for Unix - base package
description:
anti-virus utility for Unix - base package
Clam AntiVirus is an anti-virus toolkit for Unix. The main purpose of
this software is the integration with mail servers (attachment
scanning). The package provides a flexible and scalable
multi-threaded daemon in the clamav-daemon package, a command-line
scanner in the clamav package, and a tool for automatic updating via
the Internet in the clamav-freshclam package. The programs are based
on libclamav, which can be used by other software.
.
This package mainly manages the clamav system account. It is not really
useful without the clamav or clamav-daemon package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use clamav-base because anti-virus utility for Unix - base package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use clamav-base as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair clamav-base with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `clamav-base --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
